Help us make a difference in our community this summer!

Volunteer Registration

Beyond the Baseline Tennis Camp — July 6–10, 2026 — Bishop England High School — 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM

If you have any questions please don't hesitate to email me at [email protected]

⚠ USTA Safe Coach Certification Required

All volunteers working directly with campers are required to complete the USTA Safe Coach certification prior to the start of camp. This is a free online training that covers safe play, abuse prevention, and best practices for working with youth.

Complete your USTA Safe Coach certification here →

01
Personal Information

If you are under 18, a parent or legal guardian must also sign the volunteer agreement at the bottom of this form before your application can be accepted.

02
Volunteer Role

⚠ Please note: Volunteers are expected to arrive by 8:30 AM for setup and remain until 12:30 PM for cleanup. Camp runs 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM. If you are unable to meet these times on a given day, please notify us in advance at [email protected].

03
Tennis Background
04
Health & Background

If you require an EpiPen, you are required to bring it with you to camp every day. Beyond the Baseline will not be responsible for providing one.

05
USTA Safe Coach Certification

All volunteers working directly with campers must complete this free online certification before camp begins.

05
Emergency Contacts

Please provide two emergency contacts in case we are unable to reach you.

Contact 1 * Required

Contact 2 (Recommended)

06
Volunteer Agreement

1. Commitment: I commit to arriving on time and fulfilling my volunteer duties for the days I have indicated. I understand that the campers and staff are counting on me.

2. Code of Conduct: I agree to treat all campers, families, and staff with respect and kindness. I will maintain a safe, inclusive, and supportive environment at all times. Inappropriate behavior will result in immediate removal from the program.

3. USTA Safe Coach Certification: I understand that I am required to complete the USTA Safe Coach certification before working directly with campers. I agree to complete this prior to the start of camp.

4. Mandated Reporter: I understand that under South Carolina law, anyone working with minors is a mandated reporter and is legally required to report any suspected child abuse, neglect, or exploitation to the appropriate authorities immediately. I agree to comply with this obligation during my time volunteering with Beyond the Baseline.

5. Social Media Policy: I agree not to post any photos, videos, or identifying information about campers on my personal social media accounts or any other public platform without the express written consent of Beyond the Baseline and the child's parent or guardian. This policy exists to protect the privacy and safety of all campers.

6. Drug, Alcohol & Weapons Free: I agree to arrive and remain completely free of alcohol, drugs, and any impairing substances during all camp hours and volunteer activities. I also agree not to bring any weapons or dangerous items of any kind onto camp grounds. Any volunteer found to be in violation of this policy will be immediately removed from the program and authorities will be contacted if necessary.

7. Right to Remove: I understand that Beyond the Baseline reserves the right to remove any volunteer from the program at any time and for any reason, including but not limited to violations of this agreement, inappropriate conduct, or any behavior deemed harmful to campers, staff, or the program.

8. Liability: I hereby assume full responsibility for any and all damages, injuries (including death), communicable diseases, or losses that I may sustain or incur while volunteering with Beyond the Baseline. I hereby waive all claims and release and hold harmless Beyond the Baseline, its organizers, shareholders, directors, officers, employees, representatives, agents, affiliates, and lessees — individually or otherwise — from any and all liability, claims, suits, damages, expenses, fees, actions, or rights of action or judgments as a result of injury, death, or property damage arising out of or connected with my volunteer service. I further covenant not to sue any of the above-named parties for any such claims. I have read and fully understand this release and acknowledge that I am giving up substantial rights by agreeing to it voluntarily.

9. Photo Release: I consent to being photographed or filmed during camp activities for use in promotional materials and social media.

10. Confidentiality: I agree to keep any personal information about campers and their families confidential.

Parent / Guardian Signature — Required for Volunteers Under 18

If the volunteer is 18 or older, this section may be left blank. If the volunteer is under 18, a parent or legal guardian must complete this section. By signing below, the parent or guardian confirms they have read this agreement, consent to their child volunteering with Beyond the Baseline, and agree to all terms on their behalf.

* Required fields

✓

Application Received!

Thank you for volunteering with Beyond the Baseline! We will be in touch soon with more details. Please make sure to complete your USTA Safe Coach certification before July 6th!
